release_notes: - **Profile UI polish** — hover highlight fix in profile dropdown, welcome screen logo updates on profile switch. CSS cleanup and comment hygiene.
upgrade_notes: Restart the WebUI after upgrading. No data migration needed.

changes.note: New: ProfileManager for profile CRUD with avatar support
Profile-aware SOUL.md loading and cache keying
Profile API routes and startup sync
sync_profiles() for startup template sync with manifest merge
